metric_caveats: This diagnostic validation cap is a gating check for Qwen3.6:35b ExECT S4 replication; it is not a performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S4 diagnostics (eleven families), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
Pooled micro F1 across eleven families is not comparable to frozen S3 nine-family headlines.
Cap-25 ExECT runs are systematically optimistic vs full validation; treat as schema and drift signal only.
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA per docs/qwen_dspy_latency_policy.md.
Do not compare this run to GPT cap-25 or full validation as the same experiment.
Report per-family F1 and monitor frozen S3 families for regression vs S3 v1.2 GPT anchor (…235439Z).
Record local Ollama GPU residency or RAM offload when inspecting artifacts.
